'''Oondar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] trader and salesman with close connections to [[Visquis]] and the [[Exchange]] who was encountered by the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He wanted to get rid of fellow [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Geeda (Nar Shaddaa)|Geeda]] by bribing the Exile. However, the plan backfired and the Exile forced Oondar to move. Oondar then threatened the Exile, saying that he would get the Exchange to attack her.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
If the player chooses the dark-side option, then the Exile removes Geeda and Oondar gives the player a discount. This increases the influence the Exile has with the Exchange.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
